set.caption: FIGURE 17.3 One of the beams exiting from the first magnet has been passed through a second magnet rotated by 90°. Again the beam is split into two components. The third magnet gives a result that is different than what would have been expected from classical physics.

block.caption: FIGURE 21.2b Exact (red curve) and approximate (purple curve) wave functions for the ground state of the particle in the box.
